title: Coolrex's Cobblemon Collection
description: Adds cobblemon not already in the base mod, created by me!
body:
Adds cobblemon not already in the base mod, created by me!
***
- **Lycanroc line:** Rockruff tend to hang out around villages, while Lycanroc are found more in the wilderness of the mountains.
  - <small>May be incompatible with other Lycanroc addons, proceed with caution!</small>
